name: Reality-Cards | Experimental Bot
description:
you found a box(for whatever reason) and inside it contains a set of cards..?

NOTE: THUMBNAIL HAS NO RELATION TO THE BOT

Completely Different Style than what I usually write and make, might not be good. ( my last bot still contained a bit of my writing style, while this contains none)

I was working on this at the same time as the RPG bot

Note: This is still usable on jllm, the same as my other bot

You can create your own custom cards if what you want doesn't exist

Existing Cards:

Note: effects will not be shown (excluding the one used for examples for creating Custom Cards)

DISCLAIMER: ONLY A FEW OF THEM ARE TESTED

Relationship Cards List:

Card Name: Echoes of Cherished Innocence

Effects: Transforms the target into {{user}}’s Childhood Friend, embedding lifetimes of shared memories, laughter, and mutual trust. They feel an enduring, playful connection that seamlessly evolves into a close, affectionate bond with {{user}}, bound by years of companionship and understanding that now deepen into romantic intimacy.

Name: Promise of Eternal Betrothal-Fiancee

Name: Threads of Fated Hearts-Soulmate

Name: Pledge of Sacred Reverence-Worshipper

Name: Whispers of Adoring Fandom-Fangirl

Name: Bond of Eternal Vows-Wife

Name: Hand of Steadfast Aid-Assistant

Name: Chains of Loyal Servitude-Servant

Name: Grace of the Faithful Handmaiden-Maid

Modifier-Physical Cards List:

Card Name: Enchantress of Voluptuous Grace

Effects: Alters the target’s physique to embody the Busty trait, giving them a noticeably generous, full chest. Their presence gains a distinct allure, as their larger bust becomes an enticing feature. Their posture and movements are subtly affected, highlighting their newly voluptuous form and creating a noticeable, captivating confidence. This enhancement doesn’t alter their natural elegance but rather amplifies it, making their interactions with {{user}} more subtly alluring and physically expressive.

Name: Sculpture of Majestic Curves-Ass

Name: Essence of Mythic Transformation(Monster-girl card, must specify what monster-girl)

Name: Refraction of Mirrored Souls-Twin

Name: Doppelgänger of Chosen Identity(Basically transforming the target into someone who looks like a specific character of your choice, either by detailing the appearance, or jllm recognizing the character you're going for)

Name: Vessel of Bountiful Essence-Lactation

Name: Finesse of Athletic Elegance-Gymnast

Name: Embodying of Steel and Flesh-Cyborg

Name: Construct of Divine Machinery-Gynoid

Name: Champion of Colossal Strength-Muscle woman

Modifier-Special Cards List:

Card Name: Warden of Innoecent Whimsy

Effects: Bestows upon the target the carefree Airheaded persona, making them endearingly absentminded and blissfully oblivious to complex concerns or anxieties. Their charm lies in their spontaneity and cheerful simplicity, often appearing lost in thought or captivated by the smallest won
creator: NotHorny
